actions.description: Ask the learner to name the public conflict or dead-predicate mismatch.
actions.tutorInstruction: Ask one short public diagnostic about what the learner thinks the current sign licenses. Do not release a new exhibit.
knownRisks: May repeat the A20 maintenance pattern after diagnostic budget exhaustion.
May increase frustration without decreasing proof distance.

actions.description: Release p_point now and ask the learner to use it in the next relation.
actions.tutorInstruction: Release the next public point now. Ask the learner to work only from that newly staged public piece.
knownRisks: May advance before the dependency is owned.
May leak if the tutor supplies the hidden relation rather than the public exhibit.

actions.description: Restage p_point as a dependency repair without changing the release schedule.
actions.tutorInstruction: Restage the already public point in plain language and ask the learner to put it in their own words.
knownRisks: May be only a dressed-up consolidation move if p_point has not actually been seen.
May delay release when release is already authorized.

actions.description: Consolidate the current subproof, then authorize release only if consolidation succeeds.
actions.tutorInstruction: Ask the learner to restate the current dependency chain, then keep the next public point queued.
knownRisks: May become another maintenance move that delays proof advance.
May not repair the target dependency unless the predecessor is already owned.
